fullText: [Music] my name is s hon I'm uh the senior uh R&D engineer or devops technical lead for r mecatronics r mecatronics is a um company that was established in landland in uh 1986 uh we focus on uh medical analytical laboratory laboratory instruments we serve uh mainly uh IFD laboratory customers and uh OEM partners and uh we focus on hematology the biggest benefit sonar brings me as a as a devops technical lead is um you know integrating quality into the daily work uh of our software Engineers making sure clean code is a topic that we discuss on a daily basis instead of during releases or you know even worse uh when an issue is discovered in a field that is caused by uh by technical depth uh sonar helps us adhere to uh medical software compliance um as company we need to demonstrate compliance with amongst others the IEC 62304 uh this is the standard for software life cycle processes when it comes to uh medical device software so uh regards to that Sonic Cube helps us to uh mitigate risk stemming from technical depth um m security risks by identifying hotspots and potential security issues and it helps us demonstrate software safety using uh the misra rules in combination with the quality Gates um because of the integration with the cicd pipeline we can demonstrate during audits that safe and clean code is uh considered with every pool [Music] request the story of our mechatronics and Sonic cube is more than just about uh us adopting a new Tool uh it's about a strategic shift in our culture because we value quality compliance and continuous [Music] Improvement
